parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: $('Normalize SharePoint Upload Payload').item.json }];

nodes.name: PDF.co Get Upload URL
nodes.notes: SECURITY NOTE: x-api-key is hardcoded in headers. Move to n8n credentials or environment variables when possible.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { url: $json.uploaded_pdf_url, inline: false, async: true, lang: "eng", pages: "0-", profiles: JSON.stringify({ OCRMode: "Auto", OCRResolution: 300 }) } }}

nodes.name: PDF.co OCR PDF to Text
nodes.notes: SECURITY NOTE: x-api-key is hardcoded in headers. Move to n8n credentials or environment variables when possible.

nodes.name: PDF.co Check OCR Job
nodes.notes: SECURITY NOTE: x-api-key is hardcoded in headers. Move to n8n credentials or environment variables when possible.

nodes.name: Create Salesforce Case REST
nodes.notes: Creates DOCUMENT_SYSTEM Salesforce Cases in production after duplicate and idempotency checks pass.

nodes.name: SharePoint Upload Webhook
nodes.notes: Production webhook: https://example.com/webhook-placeholder — POST file metadata from Power Automate when a PDF is uploaded to the DOCUMENT_SYSTEM SharePoint folder. If import does not activate the workflow automatically, toggle Active on manually after import.

nodes.name: Normalize SharePoint Upload Payload
nodes.notes: Normalizes Power Automate / SharePoint webhook payloads and validates PDF + file ID before processing.

nodes.name: Build File ID Idempotency SOQL
nodes.notes: Prevents duplicate Case creation when Power Automate retries the same SharePoint file ID.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Final webhook response for success, duplicate, skipped, already-processed, manual-review, and OCR-error branches.

nodes.name: Merge Case With Original PDF
nodes.notes: Combines the successful Salesforce Case create response with the original PDF binary downloaded from SharePoint so the same PDF can be attached to the Case.

nodes.name: Prepare Salesforce Case File Upload
nodes.notes: Builds ContentVersion payload from the original SharePoint PDF binary. FirstPublishLocationId links the file directly to the newly created Case.

nodes.name: Upload DOCUMENT_SYSTEM PDF to Salesforce Case
nodes.notes: Creates a Salesforce File (ContentVersion) and attaches it to the new Case using FirstPublishLocationId.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "SELECT Id, ContentDocumentId, Title FROM ContentVersion WHERE Id = '" + ($('Upload DOCUMENT_SYSTEM PDF to Salesforce Case').item.json.id || $('Upload DOCUMENT_SYSTEM PDF to Salesforce Case').item.json.Id) + "' LIMIT 1" }}

nodes.name: Get Uploaded Salesforce ContentVersion
nodes.notes: Fetches ContentDocumentId for the uploaded ContentVersion. FirstPublishLocationId already links the file to the Case.

nodes.name: Build PDF.co Cleanup Body - Uploaded PDF
nodes.notes: Builds the PDF.co /v1/file/delete payload for the uploaded source PDF. Runs only after Salesforce Case File upload succeeds.

nodes.name: PDF.co Delete Uploaded Source File
nodes.notes: Force-deletes the temporary PDF.co source PDF after Salesforce ContentVersion upload and Case file-link verification succeed. ContinueOnFail prevents cleanup failure from hiding the created Case/File.

nodes.name: Build PDF.co Cleanup Body - OCR Output
nodes.notes: Builds optional cleanup payload for the OCR text output URL returned by PDF.co job/check.

nodes.name: OCR Output URL Exists?
nodes.notes: Only attempts OCR output cleanup when PDF.co returned a separate output URL.

nodes.name: PDF.co Delete OCR Output File
nodes.notes: Best-effort force-delete for the temporary OCR text output generated by PDF.co.

nodes.name: Create Manual Review Salesforce Case
nodes.notes: Creates high-priority manual review Cases when required parser fields are missing.

nodes.name: Describe Salesforce Case Fields
nodes.notes: Loads createable Case field API names so Build DOCUMENT_SYSTEM Case Body only sends fields that exist.

nodes.name: Normalize PDF.co OCR Job Status
nodes.notes: Normalizes PDF.co job/check response and tracks retry attempt (max 5 checks).

nodes.name: Wait for PDF.co OCR Retry
nodes.notes: Waits 30 seconds between PDF.co OCR job status re-checks (up to 5 total checks).

nodes.name: OCR Still Processing?
nodes.notes: Routes in-progress PDF.co OCR jobs to retry wait/check instead of immediate stop.

main.node: Upload DOCUMENT_SYSTEM PDF to Salesforce Case
Build PDF.co Cleanup Body - Uploaded PDF
Build PDF.co Cleanup Body - OCR Output
